title: Connecting Calendars from Board to Board
excerpt: I am trying to connect calendars from each board to a main calendar. I have followed the link board instuctions and still can’t get anything to show up on the main calendar. Can anyone offer any help in solving this?

posts.author: elishae79 (Elisha Ellerman)
posts.cookedHtml: I am trying to connect calendars from each board to a main calendar. I have followed the link board instuctions and still can’t get anything to show up on the main calendar. Can anyone offer any help in solving this?

posts.cookedHtml: Have you figured this out? I am also curious about this.
